# Fork-local files — protected during upstream sync.
#
# Used by .github/workflows/sync-upstream.yml: when a scheduled upstream
# merge conflicts on a file listed here, the fork's version wins
# automatically ("ours"); conflicts in any other file stop the sync for
# manual resolution. One path per line, relative to repo root. Comments (#)
# and blank lines are ignored.
#
# These entries are insurance, not divergence: each file below was offered
# upstream (Zious11/jira-cli) in identical form via the fork-friendly
# release-ops PR. While the two copies are identical, no conflict can occur;
# entries can be pruned as upstream adopts them. This file lists itself so
# the fork's list survives upstream template changes.
.github/local-workflows.txt
.github/workflows/sign-and-publish.yml
.github/workflows/sync-upstream.yml
.github/workflows/backfill-release.yml
.github/workflows/release-gap-fill.yml
Formula/jr.rb
Formula/jr-a.rb
Formula/jr-b.rb
Formula/jr-d.rb
Formula/jr-rc.rb
packaging/Info.plist
scripts/create-app.sh
scripts/create-dmg.sh
scripts/create-pkg.sh
